concerns.text: Task T030 states: 'Implement ... to perform paired t-test (or Wilcoxon)'. This violates FR-005 which mandates a 'paired t-test'. Allowing Wilcoxon as an alternative silently relaxes the statistical methodology required to satisfy FR-009 (power analysis), which is specific to the t-test distribution. This is a semantic weakening of the requirement.

Task T038 states: 'run 10 bootstrapped samples'. This fails to implement FR-007 which requires a 'Bootstrap Stability analysis by re-sampling the REAL dataset (n=10 to n=50)'. The task description omits the required sample-size sweep (n=10 to n=50), effectively reducing the deliverable to a single-point check (FR-008) and dropping the primary stability analysis requirement.

Task T039 states: 'calculate standard deviation of feature importance across bootstraps'. Without the explicit 'n=10 to n=50' sweep defined in FR-007, this task cannot satisfy the requirement to report the standard deviation of importance scores across the *sweep*. The task description is incomplete relative to the spec's acceptance criteria for FR-007.
